sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: holds up as a better snack default than most packaged options. that real-world swap value counts. fat and texture help satiety. they can hold up better than many snack foods. portable, practical snack food. nuts score real points in life because they are easy to use.

sections.title: Cons

closing.summary: Cashews does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only in small amounts when the calories stay under control.
